description_long: This house is situated on a triangular plot surrounded by a white fence and features a modern, boxy architectural design. The structure is composed of two main rectangular volumes connected by a central entryway, with a flat roof and large windows that allow for ample natural light. The front yard includes a paved driveway and a set of stairs leading up to the main entrance, which is slightly elevated. Tall, slender trees are planted throughout the property, providing a natural backdrop and some privacy. The exterior is finished in a combination of dark and light gray tones, giving the house a sleek, contemporary appearance. The rear of the property is more secluded, with additional green space and fewer visible architectural details.
description: A modern, boxy house with flat roofs, large windows, and a mix of dark and light gray finishes, set on a triangular lot with tall trees and a white fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, stairs, driveway, and symmetrical facade with large windows and surrounding trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elevation change, flat roof, and the continuation of the fence and trees along the property edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the secluded backyard, dense tree coverage, and minimal architectural features.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing the house's geometric layout, the fenced perimeter, and the integration of the house with the landscape.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Central entryway with steps, a paved approach, and a minimalist modern door flanked by large windows
